title: Fasting is a discipline that precedes Yahweh initiated transformation
body:
# Fasting is a discipline that precedes Yahweh initiated transformation.

- [ ] humans have little limited power to transform and reorient creation
- [ ] fasting is a purposeful simulation of human death in anticipation of reconstitution
- [ ] animal sacrifice is also a purposeful simulation of human death in anticipation of spatial
transformation (the transformation of local space receiving the corporeal manifestation of the Glory of Yahweh
- [ ] humans can freely choose to initiate fasting
- [ ] humans can freely choose to initiate animal sacrifice
- [ ] humans can freely choose to try to draw the presence/face/name/glory down to 2 space to perform transformation
excerpt: # Fasting is a discipline that precedes Yahweh initiated transformation.
